validator_assessment.weakest_link: Consensus assumes pivot reclaim and PMH breakout starting from 17c below pivot with 2 of last 3 bars red — ribbon structure is potential, not current momentum.
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: SPY opens RTH below premarket low 733.83 and fails to reclaim pivot 734.63 in first 30 min, proving bar momentum (bearish) over ribbon structure (bullish).

primary.condition: if SPY holds above 734.59 (battle level) and breaks PMH 737.91 on volume

secondary.condition: if SPY holds 734.59 but stalls at PMH 737.91 (held as resistance by sellers)
secondary.entry_trigger: level_hold + consolidation range 734-738, entry on intraday ribbon hold

invalidation.condition: SPY opens RTH and immediately sells below premarket low 733.83; fails to reclaim pivot 734.63 in first 30 min of RTH
invalidation.effect: Invalidates held-PML support narrative and proves ribbon is decoration without buyer conviction — breakdown mode targets 727.82; consensus trade aborted.

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY tests battle level 734.59 within the first 30 min of RTH (09:35-10:05 ET) and holds it as support on a 5-min bar close, then advances toward PMH 737.91 before 11:30 ET
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY's first 5-min closed bar after 09:35 ET prints below 733.83 (PML), confirming level breakdown rather than hold

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX remains below 18.50 throughout the 09:35-13:30 ET trading window, preserving the low-volatility risk-on backdrop and keeping the FOMC no-trade window as the only structural constraint
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX rises above 18.50 at any 5-min bar close before 13:30 ET, signaling market makers repricing FOMC downside risk and collapsing the risk-on backdrop

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY reclaims pivot 734.63 on the first or second 5-min bar close after 09:35 ET open, confirming CLEAN_BULL ribbon structure is translating into RTH momentum; price holds above 734.63 for at least 2 consecutive 5-min bars before 10:15 ET
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY's first two 5-min bars after open both close below pivot 734.63, confirming premarket bear momentum (2 red bars + below pivot) prevailed over the ribbon structure

synthesis_narrative: Today is a 4/4 unanimous bullish consensus anchored in CLEAN_BULL ribbon structure (65c spread), overnight gap +$0.69, and risk-on rotation (XLK +1.28%) — but the setup starts from a position of weakness: SPY is currently 17c below the pivot with 2 of the last 3 premarket bars red, and FOMC at 14:00 ET hard-caps the trading window to 09:35-13:30 ET only. The single most important thing to watch at market open is whether SPY immediately reclaims and holds the pivot (734.63) within the first two 5-min bars — that is the go/no-go gate separating the bull scenario (target PMH 737.91 then 740.50) from the validator's invalidation scenario (breakdown below PML 733.83, targets 727.82).

technical.one_line: CLEAN_BULL ribbon 65c spread (bullish structure) but price 17c below pivot with 2 red premarket bars — momentum lagging structure

macro.one_line: VIX 17.24 flat MID regime; overnight gap +$0.69 risk-on; FOMC 14:00 ET truncates window to 09:35-13:30 ET only

level_thesis.one_line: Battle level 734.59 (5-day Carry high) just 0.13 above spot; PMH 737.91 is secondary target; PML 733.83 is key invalidation support

internals.one_line: XLK +1.28% risk-on leadership vs XLE -0.51%; XLF flat (-0.15%) = narrow breadth, tech-only conviction

validator.top_invalidation: Recent 2-red-bar premarket action + price below pivot + flat XLF = momentum contradicts structure; FOMC creates event-driven vulnerability if open fails to reclaim 734.63
